final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic long-scroll illustration of a 元宵灯会 in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩长卷" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 唐代绢本重彩 court painting tradition (e.g. 《虢国夫人游春图》), 宋代《清明上河图》 panoramic handscroll composition, 敦煌壁画 decorative color heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide horizontal long-scroll (长卷) panoramic layout
Subject: must include 万盏花灯 illuminating the night sky, festival crowds, and 长安城 architectural context
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 streetscape at night during 元宵节
Lighting/mood: needs a lantern-lit festive night atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, luminous 重彩 palette — exact color selection is yours
Materials/textures: needs a 工笔 fine-line brushwork with layered mineral-pigment texture quality — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
